_source: IHKE3209S01 (重大傷病) — single-row NHI response shape
_note: Prostate cancer entry. Validity span 2020-11-16 → 2025-11-15 (5y card window). Note: payload returns icD10CM_CNAME (Chinese label) only — no machine-readable ICD code. Sanitized 2026-06-12: dates year-shifted per file, provider/contact identifiers replaced with synthetics — rows are to be treated as fully synthetic.
